## Pull Request Checklist

Thank you for contributing to Deep-Live-Cam Chrome Edition! Please complete the following checklist before submitting your PR.

### Description

<!-- Briefly describe your changes and why they're needed -->

### Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI/CD update
- [ ] Refactoring

### Related Issue

<!-- Link to the issue this PR addresses. Use "Fixes #123" or "Relates to #123" -->

### Testing

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] All tests pass locally
- [ ] Manual testing completed (if applicable)

### Code Quality

- [ ] Code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] Code is commented and documented
- [ ] No new warnings introduced
- [ ] Linting passes

### Documentation

- [ ] README updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Code comments added (if needed)
- [ ] API documentation updated (if applicable)

### Screenshots (if UI changes)

<!-- Add before/after screenshots here -->

### Additional Context

<!-- Any other relevant information about your PR -->
